relationships: ber:Tom yeffeɣ-d seg umahil, atan yetteddu-d ɣer uxxam s tkeṛṛust
ber:Tom yeffeɣ-d seg umahil yernu atan yetteddu ɣer uxxam s tkeṛṛust
ber:Sami yella la yetteddu seg temnaḍt ɣer tayeḍ deg Maṣer, yettqellib ɣef teɣtas
ber:Tom yennum yetteddu seg umahil ɣer uxxam ɣef uḍar
ber:Asawal n Sami yella yetteddu ad yeɣsi
ber:Tikkal, Tom yetteddu ɣef uḍar seg umahil ɣer uxxam
ber:Krayellan yetteddu akken iwata deg umahil﹖
ber:Aduktur Bakir yella yetteddu ad idawi medden deg yixxamen-nsen
ber:Sami yetteddu ɣer yiwet n tmesgida tadigant
ber:Asawal-nni ur yetteddu ara a Mass Tamori
ber:Asakal-nni yella la yetteddu ad yeqleɛ imir-nni kan
ber:Sami yella la yetteddu ad yegzem asawal
ber:Sami yella yetteddu yal ass ɣer umahil
ber:Sami yella yetteddu ɣer umahil yal ass
ber:Asawal n Sami ur la yetteddu ara
ber:Tom qrib dima yetteddu ɣef uḍar ɣer umahil
ber:Tom qrib dima yetteddu ɣer umahil ɣef uḍar
ber:Ulac akk sanda ay yetteddu Tom war ma yewwi asawal-nnes
